items.title: France's Mbappé calls Paraguay tactics 'ugly'
items.summary: France star Kylian Mbappé laughed and smiled -- and scored, of course -- when Paraguay tried to bait him and his teammates into fouls and provoke fights, as hot heads became a r...

items.title: Does Home Field Advantage Exist At The World Cup? A Look Through The Years
items.summary: This weekend, England faces the ultimate road game at this World Cup. Here's a look at home field advantage through the years.
